titles.text: Simple 1500 Series Vol. 73: The Invaders - Space Invaders 1500
Simple 1500 シリーズ Vol 73 The インベーダー スペースインベーダー1500

descriptions.text: The Invaders - Space Invaders 1500 features the originals arcade machines (with and without background artwork) and a new 3d mode, called Space Invaders 3D that features a new graphics 3d engine, a first person view and other camera angles and vibration function for all the modes modes.
